Localization.Description: A browser was started with remote debugging enabled, which can be used to forward traffic to an attacker's machine

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Browser {object.process.name} was started with remote debugging to address 127.0.0.1:{dst.port} and forwarding to port {src.port} enabled on behalf of user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
Browser {object.process.name} may have been started with remote debugging to address 127.0.0.1:{dst.port} enabled on behalf of user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
